markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy to meet aggressive growth goals.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** The strategy will pivot from broad topics to specific use cases (e.g., "text off reporting") to capture high-intent searchers, a move validated by recent ChatGPT conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [**Aggressive Growth Goal:** Yourco set a 15% monthly growth target for 2026, requiring a more strategic and aggressive content approach.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**Content Optimization:** Top-performing pages will be optimized first for maximum impact. New content will integrate social proof (customer quotes, case studies) to boost conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Technical Blockers:** Persistent non-indexing issues are blocking content performance and require a fix. A Friday meeting with Kyle is set to address on-page conversion optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)

## Topics

### Strategy Pivot: From Broad to Use-Case Focus

  - [**Problem:** The current strategy isn't driving visibility for high-intent queries, despite new content.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Insight:** Recent ChatGPT conversions are driven by specific use-case searches, not broad evaluation topics.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift focus to granular use cases, using a list of current customer applications as a guide.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
      - [**Example:** Instead of "reporting," target "text off reporting," "attendance reporting," or "employee survey reporting."](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**Action:** Refine Check That prompts to track these specific use cases and add "vs." comparisons (e.g., "Yourco vs. Udext").](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)

### Performance & Goal Alignment

  - [**January Performance:** Actuals were strong, reaching \~75% of the 25-conversion goal.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [**2026 Growth Goal:** Yourco set a 15% monthly growth target.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**Content Optimization:** Top-performing pages will be optimized first to maximize impact from proven assets.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
      - [**Top 3 Pages:** "Communication structure," "texting for attendance," and "what to do when an employee calls sick."](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Conversion Optimization:** A Friday meeting with Kyle is set to identify on-page conversion improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)

### Content Enhancements for Conversion

  - [**Social Proof:** New content will integrate social proof to build trust and drive conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [**Customer Quotes:** Jessica will provide a list of quotes for contextual placement.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [**Case Studies:** Launching end-of-month. Early data/quotes will be used in content now.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [**Keyword Reframing:** The "Frontline Intelligence" concept will be reframed using higher-volume terms to improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [**Target Keywords:** "Workforce analytics," "people analytics," and "HR analytics."](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)

### Technical Blockers: Non-Indexing Pages

  - [**Issue:** Several pages are not being indexed by Google, blocking their performance.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**Misleading Metrics:** Recent performance reports included two non-indexed pages as "refreshes," skewing the data.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [**Proposed Fix:** Change URLs on non-indexed pages to force re-indexing. A/B testing this fix on one page first was also discussed.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)

### Tooling & Visibility Tracking

  - [**Check That Access:** Carrie added Jessica to the shared Check That workspace to enable collaborative prompt refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [**Visibility Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
      - [**Citation Share:** Yourco is ahead of competitors (Staffbase, etc.) in the "employee engagement" category.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
      - [**Top Prompt:** "HR communication platform for employees without email" shows 60% visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [**Rationale:** High visibility on niche, high-intent queries is more valuable than broad, low-intent volume.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
      - [Refine Check That prompts to track specific use cases and add "vs." comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [Optimize top-performing pages for conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
      - [Investigate and fix non-indexing page issues.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up meeting with Jessica for tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [Provide a list of approved customer quotes for content integration.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**Carrie & Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
      - [Meet with Kyle on Friday to discuss on-page conversion optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
      - [Meet tomorrow to review the content prioritization list and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/W4Z-CRrEFxVxRWw3xPzdu15ii68bjUUX?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
